name: worker_bootstrap
steps: runner enqueues boot jobs with idempotency keys
portfolio.boot enqueues first scout/tick/cfo jobs
ops.heartbeat/snapshot start rescheduling via idempotency
ceo.daily_tick runs once per boot + daily
retry_logic: idempotency keys prevent dupes; failed jobs retry up to max_attempts
failure_paths: if Supabase unreachable worker retries on next poll

name: content_pipeline
steps: portfolio.tick enqueues editorial.ideate for active account
editorial.ideate picks N niche topics, writes board_items, enqueues creative.write_script per topic
creative.write_script calls ceo_decide (v5.5); if reuse loads from asset_library; else calls brain.write_script
cqo.grade_script grades; rewrites up to 2x if fail; if pass enqueues creative.render (GAP: not currently wired)
creative.render: visuals.beat_frame per beat (Gemini or procedural), composer.render (ffmpeg), voice TTS, returns mp4
post.polish: trim/normalize (stub)
monetization.inject appends link-in-bio / #ad
risk.scan_content (stub)
distribution.publish to IG/YT (dry-run if no keys)
analytics.collect_metrics enqueued in 24h
ceo.record_outcome stores asset (NOT CALLED)
retry_logic: max 2 rewrite attempts, 2 LLM attempts total
human_approval: wait_human escalations pause work until approved
outputs: MP4 published to connected platforms, receipts, performance rows
failure_paths: LLM failure → fallback to demo/cached; render failure → fail job; publish failure → retry once

name: daily_ceo_review
steps: _snapshot_roi: sum run_ledger spend + performance metrics per account per day
_allocate_budgets: cold starts $0.25 free; scale winners (ROI>3x) to mix/premium; pause losers after 3 days ROI<0.3; balanced for 1-3x
_write_recommendations: 3-7 action items for the CEO
failure_paths: if tables missing, logs but doesn't crash

name: brand_onboarding
steps: detect account with <5 docs
call architect to generate all 13 brand docs
store in account_documents
failure_paths: LLM failure retried; partial docs left for human completion

name: human_approval
trigger: job enters wait_human, or grade fails final, or CEO escalates
steps: human_desk.sync scans escalations + wait_human jobs
Founder sees cards on /dashboard/workspace HumanDesk component
Founder Approve/Reject/Edit
resolution propagates to job, which resumes
